title: HiredScore Earns Workday Certified Badge for Integration With Workday Recruiting
text: Used by numerous Fortune 500 global clients, including Southwest Airlines, Allstate, and more, HiredScore enables HR teams to instantly identify priority candidates among active and passive applicants, circulate employees to new job opportunities, and balances D&I and HR productivity goals NEW YORK , Oct. 27, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- HiredScore , a Workday (NASDAQ: WDAY) Access Software Partner, today announced that it has achieved Workday Certified Integration status. HiredScore provides customers with a seamless integration that connects Workday Recruiting with HiredScore's Talent Orchestration Solutions.

title: Nasdaq Bear Market: 3 Stocks to Buy on the Dip
text: Buying the dip is an effective way to lower your cost basis for long-term positions. This strategy helps people realize a great upside when stocks recover, but not every stock is a buy the dip candidate.

title: Workday: Stellar Growth And Prospects But Eclipsed By High Valuation
text: Workday is a leading provider of enterprise cloud applications for finance and human resources, known for user-friendly design and real-time insights. The company has shown consistent revenue growth, with a compound annual growth rate of approximately 15.5% over the past three years. Workday's strong financial performance, deep market penetration, and strategic initiatives position it as a leader in the enterprise software space. However, its current stock price indicates limited potential for capital gains.

title: 3 Enterprise Software Stocks to Bet On Amid GenAI-Driven Rally
text: Considering the growing demand for generative AI-enabled enterprise software and a possible improvement in profitability due to cost-cutting initiatives, we believe that there is still upward potential left in ADBE, CRM and WDAY stocks.

title: 2 Growth Stocks to Hold for the Next 10 Years
text: Workday's wide economic moat combines nicely with impressive cash flow generation. Salesforce dominates its market and continues to grow while expanding its profit margins.

title: Software Stocks To Watch Amid Debates Over Gen AI, Cloud Computing
text: Software growth stocks outperformed in 2023. But will the artificial intelligence-driven rally be sustainable for software stocks?

title: Invest in 5 Internet Software Stocks to Enhance Your Portfolio
text: We have narrowed our search to five Internet software stocks with strong potential for the rest of 2023. These are: PANW, PINS, MNDY, WDAY, TWLO.

title: SkyHive Earns Workday Certified Integration
text: PALO ALTO, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--SkyHive®, a generative AI software company and a Workday (NASDAQ: WDAY) Ventures partner helping companies and communities around the world move from jobs-based to skills-based, today announced that it has achieved a Workday Certified Integration with Workday Human Capital Management (HCM). Joint Workday and SkyHive customers using Workday HCM and Workday Skills Cloud can manage their job catalogs and job architectures in Workday with labor market benchmarkin.

title: 3 AI Stocks You Can Confidently Buy After a Market Downturn
text: Nvidia's sales of chips will keep soaring as the AI market expands. Cloudflare's content delivery network will process more data as more websites deploy AI services.

title: 1 Green Flag and 1 Red Flag for Workday's Future
text: Workday is rolling out a new AI Marketplace and generative AI tools. But it unexpectedly reduced its long-term revenue guidance.
